languages.text: {n}Веки пожилого мужчины закрыты, а лицо исполнено безмятежности. Он казался бы мирно спящим, если бы не смертельная бледность лица и чудовищно изувеченная шея. Когда-то ему установили голосовой имплант, но недавно его грубо вырвали из тела несчастного. Тонкий свист то и дело вырывается из металлического шланга, заменяющего трахею. Старик крепко сжимает что-то в правой руке. Это богато украшенные четки — какими пользуются рукоположенные служители Экклезиархии.{/n}

{n}The old man's eyelids are closed and his face is serene. He might appear to be sleeping peacefully, were it not for the deathly pallor of his face and his monstrously mangled neck. He had been fitted with a voice implant at some point previously, but it had recently been wrenched from the unfortunate man's body. Every so often, the metal hose now serving as his trachea emits a reedy whistling sound. He is clutching something tightly in his right hand — it is an ornate set of prayer beads, the kind used by ordained servants of the Ecclesiarchy.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Веки пожилого мужчины закрыты, а лицо исполнено безмятежности. Он казался бы мирно спящим, если бы не смертельная бледность лица и чудовищно изувеченная шея. Когда-то ему установили голосовой имплант, но недавно его грубо вырвали из тела несчастного. Тонкий свист то и дело вырывается из металлического шланга, заменяющего трахею. languages.text: {n}老人のまぶたは閉じており、顔は穏やかだ。死の恐怖に染まった顔色と、ひどい首の傷跡を除けば、彼は静かに眠っているように見えるだろう。かつては声のインプラントを装着していたが、最近、不幸な男の体から引き抜かれた。時々、彼の気管を代用している金属製のホースから、かすれた笛のような音がする。右手に何かを強く握っている。それは、教会の聖職者たちが使うような、装飾的な祈祷珠のセットである。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The old man's eyelids are closed and his face is serene. He might appear to be sleeping peacefully, were it not for the deathly pallor of his face and his monstrously mangled neck. He had been fitted with a voice implant at some point previously, but it had recently been wrenched from the unfortunate man's body. Every so often, the metal hose now serving as his trachea emits a reedy whistling sound. He is clutching something tightly in his right hand — it is an ornate set of prayer beads, the kind used by ordained servants of the Ecclesiarchy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}老人のまぶたは閉じており、顔は穏やかだ。死の恐怖に染まった顔色と、ひどい首の傷跡を除けば、彼は静かに眠っているように見えるだろう。かつては声のインプラントを装着していたが、最近、不幸な男の体から引き抜かれた。時々、彼の気管を代用している金属製のホースから、かすれた笛のような音がする。右手に何かを強く握っている。それは、教会の聖職者たちが使うような、装飾的な祈祷珠のセットである。{/n}

languages.text: {n}老人双眼紧闭，面容安详。若非他脸色惨白，脖颈也被摧残得惨不忍睹，他看起来就像是在平静地安睡。他此前曾安装过发声植入物，但那装置最近刚被人从这可怜人身上生扯了下来。现在，那根充当他气管的金属软管时不时就会发出尖锐的哨音。他的右手紧攥着某物——那是一串华丽的念珠，正是国教神职人员常用的款式。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The old man's eyelids are closed and his face is serene. He might appear to be sleeping peacefully, were it not for the deathly pallor of his face and his monstrously mangled neck. He had been fitted with a voice implant at some point previously, but it had recently been wrenched from the unfortunate man's body. Every so often, the metal hose now serving as his trachea emits a reedy whistling sound. He is clutching something tightly in his right hand — it is an ornate set of prayer beads, the kind used by ordained servants of the Ecclesiarchy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}老人双眼紧闭，面容安详。若非他脸色惨白，脖颈也被摧残得惨不忍睹，他看起来就像是在平静地安睡。他此前曾安装过发声植入物，但那装置最近刚被人从这可怜人身上生扯了下来。现在，那根充当他气管的金属软管时不时就会发出尖锐的哨音。他的右手紧攥着某物——那是一串华丽的念珠，正是国教神职人员常用的款式。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los párpados del anciano están cerrados y su rostro se muestra sereno. Parecería dormir plácidamente, de no ser por su palidez mortal y los espantosos restos de su cuello. Antes había contado con un implante de voz, pero se le ha arrancado recientemente. Ocasionalmente, la manguera de metal que ahora le sirve como tráquea emite un sonido sibilante y aflautado. Aferra algo en su mano derecha: un conjunto ornamentado de cuentas de oración, como las que usan los sirvientes ordenados de la Eclesiarquía.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The old man's eyelids are closed and his face is serene. He might appear to be sleeping peacefully, were it not for the deathly pallor of his face and his monstrously mangled neck. Every so often, the metal hose now serving as his trachea emits a reedy whistling sound. He is clutching something tightly in his right hand — it is an ornate set of prayer beads, the kind used by ordained servants of the Ecclesiarchy.{/n}

Antes había contado con un implante de voz, pero se le ha arrancado recientemente. Ocasionalmente, la manguera de metal que ahora le sirve como tráquea emite un sonido sibilante y aflautado. languages.text: {n}Die Augenlieder des alten Mannes sind geschlossen. Sein Gesicht wirkt entspann. Wären da nicht die tödliche Blässe in seinem Gesicht und sein zerfetzter Hals, könnte man den Eindruck gewinnen, er würde friedlich schlafen. Er hatte offenbar ein Sprachimplantat, das gewaltsam aus dem Körper des bedauernswerten Mannes entfernt wurde. Ab und an ertönt aus dem Metallschlauch, der mittlerweile seine Luftröhre ersetzt, ein pfeifendes Geräusch. Er hält etwas fest in seiner rechten Hand ... offenbar eine Kette mit Gebetsperlen, die sich bei den Dienern der Ekklesiarchie großer Beliebtheit erfreuen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The old man's eyelids are closed and his face is serene. He might appear to be sleeping peacefully, were it not for the deathly pallor of his face and his monstrously mangled neck. He had been fitted with a voice implant at some point previously, but it had recently been wrenched from the unfortunate man's body. Every so often, the metal hose now serving as his trachea emits a reedy whistling sound. He is clutching something tightly in his right hand — it is an ornate set of prayer beads, the kind used by ordained servants of the Ecclesiarchy.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Augenlieder des alten Mannes sind geschlossen. Sein Gesicht wirkt entspann. Wären da nicht die tödliche Blässe in seinem Gesicht und sein zerfetzter Hals, könnte man den Eindruck gewinnen, er würde friedlich schlafen. Er hatte offenbar ein Sprachimplantat, das gewaltsam aus dem Körper des bedauernswerten Mannes entfernt wurde. Ab und an ertönt aus dem Metallschlauch, der mittlerweile seine Luftröhre ersetzt, ein pfeifendes Geräusch. Er hält etwas fest in seiner rechten Hand ... offenbar eine Kette mit Gebetsperlen, die sich bei den Dienern der Ekklesiarchie großer Beliebtheit erfreuen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les paupières du vieil homme sont closes. À voir son visage serein, on pourrait croire qu'il dort paisiblement, si ce n'est que son teint est d'une pâleur cadavérique et son cou, affreusement mutilé. Il semble qu'il était doté d'un implant vocal qui a été récemment arraché à sa gorge. De temps à autre, un sifflement flûté s'échappe du tuyau de métal qui lui sert désormais de trachée. Dans sa main droite, il serre un chapelet orné qui ressemble à ceux qu'utilisent les serviteurs ordonnés de l'Ecclésiarchie.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yaşlı adamın göz kapakları kapalı, yüzüyse dingin. Ölümcül solgunluğu ve korkunç derecede parçalanmış boynu olmasaydı huzur içinde uyuduğu sanılabilirdi. Daha önce bir noktada ses implantı takılmış ancak yakın zamanda talihsiz adamın vücudundan sökülüp alınmış. Şimdi soluk borusu işlevi gören metal hortum, arada bir ince bir ıslık sesi çıkarıyor. Sağ elinde bir şeyi sıkıca tutuyor. Bu, Ekleşiarşi'nin atanmış hizmetkârlarınca kullanılan türden süslü bir dua tespihi.{/n}
